title: ranunculus geraniifolius subsp. aduncus
intro: Ranunculus geraniifolius subsp. aduncus, also known as the Aduncus Ranunculus or Mountain Buttercup, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Ranunculus genus. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ranunculus geraniifolius subsp. aduncus include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and fighting off infections. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
